verses.text: Topa in Moses sam a, kikhopna buk panin amah hopihin hih bangin ci hi

“Israel mite tungah gen in la, amaute tungah hih bangin ci in: Note khatpeuh in Topa' tungah biakna na paipih uh ciangin, ganhing tawh na biakna pen bawnghon panin hita leh tuuhon panin hita leh na paipih ding uh hi
“Ama biakna pen bawnghon panin meihal biakna ahih leh, amah in a sitbaanglo a pa khat pia ding a, Topa' mai-ah a kisan' theihna dingin kikhopna bukkongah pia ding hi
Amah in meihal biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga ding a, ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlna dingin kisang ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in Topa' mai-ah a bawngtal go ding hi. Aaron' suan siampite in a si hong paipihin, kikhopna buk konga biakna tau kimkotah a si theh ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna ganhing a vun hawkin semnen ding a
Aaron' suan siampite in biakna tau tungah mei koihin, mei tungah a ngeina bangin sing koih ding hi
Tua ciangin Aaron' suan siampite in a sanente, a lutang leh a thaute, biakna tau tunga om mei tunga sing tungah a ngeina bangin koih ding a
ahih hangin a sungkuate leh a khete tui tawh sil ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tawh kihal biakna, Topa-a' dingin a gim namtui, meihal biakna-in biakna tau tungah a vekpi-in hal ding hi
“Meihal biakna dingin ama letsong pen tuu hita leh keel hita leh a hon lak panin ahih leh, amah in a sitbaanglo a pa khat pia ding hi
Amah in Topa' mai biakna tau tung leilu lampangah go ding a, Aaron' suan siampite in biakna tau tung kimkotah a si theh ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in semnen ding a, biakna tau tunga om mei tunga sing tungah a ngeina bangin siampipa in a lutang leh a thau tawh koih khawm ding a

ahih hangin a sungkuate leh a khete amah in tui tawh sil ding hi. Siampipa in a vekpi-in pia-in, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa-a' dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakpiakna ahi hi
“ Topa' tungah ama biakna pen vasa tawh meihal biakna ahih leh, amah in vakhu tawh ahi zongin, kawl vakhuno tawh ahi zongin, a biakna hong paipih ding hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in biakna tau-ah paipihin a lu heektat ding a, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Biakna tau pangah a si taakkhiasak ding hi
Amah in a tangkhai leh a multe bot khia-in, vut koihna, biakna tau pang nisuahna lamah lawnkhia ding hi

Amah in a khate-in balkek ding a, ahih hangin baltatlo ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tunga om sing tung, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa-a' dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakna ahi hi.
